candidate_definition_hints.text: The Torch-MLIR project aims to provide first class support from the PyTorch ecosystem to the MLIR ecosystem.
The Torch-MLIR project aims to provide first class compiler support from the [PyTorch](https://pytorch.org) ecosystem to the MLIR ecosystem.
